_comment: auto-google-analytics plugin settings. Copy to <project>/.claude/auto-google-analytics-settings.json (or ~/.claude/ for a global default) and edit. Re-read every session — no reinstall needed. A pre-set environment variable always wins over these.
_web_analytics_reminder_help: SessionStart nudge when a web project has no analytics inventory yet. Set false to silence.
_sa_key_path_help: Absolute path to the Google service-account JSON key (analytics.edit, granted Administrator at the GA account level). This is the ONE human prerequisite — Google blocks automation login. Leave EMPTY to auto-pick the shared key: the plugin walks up from the project to find a GLOBAL.env and reads GA_PROVISION_SA_KEY (+ GA_PROVISION_SA_EMAIL/TZ/CURRENCY) from it, so every project under the same account is zero-config. If neither is set it falls back to guided-manual (you paste Measurement IDs). Never commit the key.
_gcloud_path_help: Optional path to the gcloud CLI, used ONLY as a token-minting fallback when the google-auth Python library is not installed. Leave empty to use `gcloud` on PATH (or rely on google-auth).
